---
title: "20260206_183943_AGENTS.qmd"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.corvus_quarantine\20260206_183943_AGENTS.qmd"
loc: 323
complexity: 1
logic_score: 10.00
style_score: 10.00
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 10.00
---

## Intent
The `20260206_183943_AGENTS.qmd` sector implements modular logic focusing on internal logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via internal logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 10.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 10.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/lets-go.md)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/run-task.md)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/investigate.md)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/wrap-it-up.md)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/SovereignFish.qmd)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/lets-go.qmd)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/investigate.qmd)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/plan.qmd)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/execute.qmd)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/test.qmd)
- [*](file://.agents/workflows/wrap-it-up.qmd)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
